template:
How to generate template yamls:
- For *Core-Verified apworlds*, your `/Players/Templates` folder will already have template yamls by default.
- For *Custom apworlds*:
  - Install the apworld first by double clicking on it
  - Open **ArchipelagoLauncher.exe** to start the Launcher, and click on **Generate Template Options** to create template yamls for all of the apworlds in your `/custom_worlds` folder as well as your `/lib/worlds` folder.
  - A File Explorer window will then open pointing directly to your `/Players/Templates` folder, with all of the new template files.  Use these to create player options for any of the apworlds you have installed, Core-Verified or Custom.
- See <https://archipelago.gg/tutorial/Archipelago/advanced_settings_en> for help with formatting yamls.
